name: HEIST.IO
author: Poki
description: HEIST.IO is an action-packed shooting game where the battle for the bank is on! Play as the robbers and pull off the ultimate heist, or join the police force to stop them in their tracks. Fight for control, upgrade your weapons, and claim your rewards. Will you escape with the loot or protect the vault? How to play HEIST.IO? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Shoot: left click Reload: R Who created HEIST.IO? HEIST.IO is created by Art Industries.
